original_claim: Sedentary behavior and PCOS share a common genetic architecture.
recommended_wording: Sedentary behavior and PCOS may have partly convergent genetic and biological architectures.
directness: Indirect; no direct shared causal variant test in inspected evidence
recommended_citations: Wang et al. 2022; Liu et al. 2022; Stamou et al. 2024; Zhao et al. 2025

original_claim: LST GWAS identified 88 genome-wide significant loci.
recommended_wording: Wang et al. identified 99 loci associated with MVPA, LST, and/or sedentary behavior at work.
notes: Do not use 88 LST-specific loci unless verified from full text.

original_claim: LST loci are enriched in skeletal muscle and brain expression.
recommended_wording: LST-associated loci showed skeletal-muscle enrichment; brain enrichment requires additional verification.
directness: Partial; skeletal muscle supported but brain not confirmed
notes: Remove brain enrichment unless independently verified.

recommended_wording: BMI may partly mediate or confound the LST-PCOS association, so BMI-independent effects should be interpreted cautiously.
recommended_citations: Wang et al. 2022; relevant PCOS MR references from package
notes: BMI-independent claim was flagged as not externally supported.

original_claim: MST1R has been implicated in ovarian function or PCOS.
recommended_wording: MST1R/RON biology supports inflammatory and metabolic plausibility, while present analyses prioritize MST1R for functional follow-up.
directness: Indirect; no direct MST1R-PCOS ovarian evidence found
recommended_citations: Wang et al. 2002; Huang et al. 2020; Li et al. 2015; Dapas and Dunaif 2022; Stamou et al. 2024
notes: Avoid implying established MST1R ovarian mechanism.

original_claim: MAGMA/TWAS-JTI/SMR prioritization establishes MST1R as a pleiotropic node.
recommended_wording: MAGMA/TWAS-JTI/SMR prioritization identifies MST1R as a candidate pleiotropic node for functional follow-up.
recommended_citations: Current study plus MST1R/RON biological references

original_claim: TSKU evidence is complete enough for final manuscript use.
recommended_wording: TSKU remains a candidate requiring rerun PubMed search and direct verification.
directness: Incomplete due to failed PubMed query
notes: Status Partial because TSKU search failed / Too Many Requests.

recommended_wording: Cerebellar enrichment is a present-study signal requiring external validation.
notes: Do not present as externally validated.

original_claim: PI3K-Akt, AMPK, immune, endocrine, and neurobehavioral pathways establish multisystem causality.
recommended_wording: External evidence supports plausible multisystem convergence, not established causality.

original_claim: PMOS is a verified concept that can be used in manuscript text.
recommended_wording: PCOS has multisystem reproductive, metabolic, inflammatory, and cardiometabolic dimensions.
notes: Status Partial until PMOS terminology is verified.

original_claim: BMI-independent genetic claim is externally supported.
recommended_wording: BMI-independent genetic interpretation should be treated as a current-study finding requiring cautious validation.
recommended_citations: Current study plus PCOS/sedentary context references
notes: Do not use external literature as proof of current-study genetic independence.

original_claim: Demographic differences between LST and PCOS GWAS populations introduce bias.
recommended_wording: Demographic differences may introduce bias; residual age-, sex-, and phenotype-related heterogeneity cannot be excluded.
directness: Direct for population differences; indirect for actual bias
recommended_citations: Wang et al. 2022; Dapas et al. 2020; Zhang et al. 2025
notes: Ready package uses appropriate cautious wording.

original_claim: Propensity score matching is specifically required.
recommended_wording: Future studies should use sex- and age-stratified analyses, age adjustment, and other comparability-enhancing approaches where appropriate.
directness: No dedicated PSM methods citation in package
recommended_citations: Wang et al. 2022; Dapas et al. 2020; Zhang et al. 2025
notes: Add a methods citation if PSM remains explicit.

original_claim: Epidemiological sedentary-PCOS evidence proves direct causal or genetic coupling.
recommended_wording: Epidemiological evidence is heterogeneous and supports cautious association/background framing.
directness: Direct for epidemiological context, not genetic coupling
notes: Use as background, not proof of shared architecture.
